channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parked car all day on yellow line blocking my driveway, 15th July
item.description:
Very poor workmanship over the weekend bt OUTREACH/BT/TALENT staining the pavement, road and My drive entrance and today a blue Ford vehicle parked on yellow line and outside my drive making it very difficult for me to come out of my drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping / mattress in the middle of the footpath, 15th July
item.description:
Fly tipping / mattress in the middle of the footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping close to wickes and soba & sushi as usual, 15th July
item.description:
Fly tipping close to wickes and soba & sushi as usual

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting on the verges of the road!, 14th July
item.description:
The grass on the verges of the roads need cutting!! We had to take our dog to an emergency vet this evening as one of the seeds from the high grass got lodged in his ear!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Saxville Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many bikes blocking the pavement often, 14th July
item.description:
There is a real problem outside 69 Cadogan Terrace with forest bikes and lime bikes scattered all over the pavement sometimes as many as 40 bikes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69, Cadogan Terrace, Bow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eruv on public lamppost, 14th July
item.description:
Been here for at least 2 weeks Illegal cable put across the street in public property for religious purposes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping and Rubbish being dumped, 14th July
item.description:
Fly Tipping and Rubbish being dumped - once again!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 14th July
item.description:
Litter behind bars, people can’t access area to clean it up. Next to entrance close to scholars court flats entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Madeline Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Temporary covering over broken manhole cover has come loose and there is now a dangerous exposed hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Close, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dear residence beware. There's a crackhead who lives in the block here who does dirty work for other people old pensioners who haven't got the balls to do their own dirty work.They pay crackhead called Rodger to vandalise other people's property for drug money or a score beware his names Roger.He dresses like a black Jamaican guy but he is a white UK citizen. He also drive banged up vehicles. Crackhead Rodger is a class A drug user. Has loads of tattoos on body, plaited hair like Jamaican style on a white man and looks really scruffy. Does anything for bits of money. Handyman in local area. If you have an issue you can hire Rodger to vandalize or smash up something of your neighbors if they're causing you problems he takes a score to do it. This is what drug addicts do in area destroy the community., 14th July
item.description:
Dear residence beware. There's a crackhead who lives in the block here who does dirty work for other people old pensioners who haven't got the balls to do their own dirty work.They pay crackhead called Rodger to vandalise other people's property for drug
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins obstructing pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Apparently new occupants do not know to take household wheelie bins (3) on property. They block the pavement 24/7. This constitutes a hazard to pedestrians as this is a busy cycle route.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaucer Drive, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation is obscuring the bus stop, 14th July
item.description:
Overhanging vegetation is obscuring this bus stop. Also same problem with bus stop on the other side of the main road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin needs emptying and litter lying around, 14th July
item.description:
Bin overflowing and litter spread around. Bin just off path leading to steps down to Beckenham Lane. Bins on Martins Hill need to be emptied everyday and litter cleared up as it is often spread around.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Naval Walk, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown path, 14th July
item.description:
Nettles and brambles protruding across the path which makes it difficult to walk down..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hill House Mews, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again., 14th July
item.description:
Abandoned fridge left on pavement. Dangerous for children and animals. Unsightly for local residents who constantly have to live with other people’s illegally dumped rubbish. Please at least erect a camera to try and deter people. It’s unsightly, unhygienic and dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 14th July
item.description:
Littering behind Victoria pub

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A living rubbish tip, 14th July
item.description:
Various crap dumped outside park. Carpet bins, rubbish bag, and now a Mattress. Been left here since last week! Nothing is being picked up!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Victoria Way SE7, 14th July
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove the grey bag, left post street sweeping & collect the table someone dumped on the street. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rathmore Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 14th July
item.description:
People leave recycling rubbish out all night and it gets blown around. It's all over the path and grass and gets in my garden hedges
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leith Hill Green, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over this raised area, 14th July
item.description:
Please litter pick

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leontine Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
